channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.4%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why the path to No 10 is not an easy one for any of Starmer’s would-be challengers
item.description: Why the path to No 10 is not an easy one for any of Starmer’s would-be challengers

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Angela Rayner settles tax bill with HMRC

item.title: LabourList: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?
item.description: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Think there are a lot of policy wonks who need to grapple with the fact that reactionary rhetoric can cause widespread harm in a way that doesn't require an actual policy basis per se. You don't need to legislate an a...
item.description: Think there are a lot of policy wonks who need to grapple with the fact that reactionary rhetoric can cause widespread harm in a way that doesn't require an actual policy basis per se. You don't need to legislate an a...
